creator: Food In 5 | Bill
source_text:
Chilli lime chicken with coconut rice & watermelon salad 🍉🥥🍋‍🟩 

Comment ‘recipe’ and I’ll send you a link to where you can find the full written recipe 🫶

Macros per serve:
53g protein 
40g fat
72g carbs

857 calories per serve 💪 

Ingredients for 3 servings: 

For the chicken 🍗 
600g Chicken Thigh Fillets
3 Cloves of Garlic
3 Tbsp Greek Yoghurt
Small Handful of Fresh Coriander
1 Tsp Paprika
1 Tsp Chilli Flakes
1 Tsp Onion Powder
1 Fresh Lime
1 Tbsp Honey
2 Tbsp Olive Oil

For the watermelon 🍉 
1/2 Watermelon
1 Cucumber
1/2 Red Onion
Small Handful of Fresh Mint
1/2 Lime
125g Feta
2 Tbsp Olive Oil

For the coconut rice 🥥 
200g Uncooked Rice
400ml Coconut Milk

For the rice, cook to packeted instructions but swap 400ml of the required water for coconut milk 🤝

#highprotein #easyrecipes #mealprep #healthyfood #wholefood

expected.name: Chilli lime chicken with coconut rice & watermelon salad
steps: For the rice, cook to packeted instructions but swap 400ml of the required water for coconut milk 🤝

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
Only the rice component has an explicit preparation instruction in the acquired description.
Accepted after a general component-prefixed imperative signal and lexical-word title counting; no creator identity or exact recipe phrase is used.
